subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him, and He Who hath manifested Himself is verily the Saviour of all nations and the Quickener of the world. None shall prevent Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی ظهر انه لمنجی الامم و محیی العالم لایمنعه
subcodes.subjects: @station of the Manifestation of God, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @power of the Manifestation of God
